description_long: This object is a single, large green leaf with seven pointed, serrated leaflets radiating from a central stem, resembling the iconic shape of a Cannabis sativa leaf. The leaflets are elongated, with sharply defined edges and a rich gradient of green hues, lighter at the tips and darker near the base. The central leaflet is the longest, with the others symmetrically arranged on either side, creating a star-like appearance. The surface of the leaf appears smooth with a slight matte finish, and the veins are subtly visible, adding to the realism. There is no visible pot, soil, or stem base, and the object is presented against a plain background. No decorative elements, labels, or additional plant parts are visible.
description: A single, large green Cannabis sativa leaf with seven pointed, serrated leaflets and a smooth, matte surface. No pot, soil, or decorative elements are visible.
description_view_0: A thin, edge-on view of the leaf, showing only the narrow profile of the leaflets.
description_view_1: A full, frontal view of the leaf displaying all seven pointed, serrated leaflets in a star-like arrangement.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, similar to view 0, showing the thin profile of the leaf.
description_view_3: A frontal view identical to view 1, showing the full spread of the leaflets.
